title: bistorta coriacea
intro: Bistorta coriacea, also known as alpine bistort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Polygonaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent qualities. The health benefits of Bistorta coriacea include its ability to reduce bleeding and swelling, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of wounds, ulcers, and digestive issues. Bistorta coriacea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional.
